Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); rows=d['table']['rows']; non_null=[\(r[0],r[3]\) for r in rows if r[3] is not None]; print\(f'Total rows: {len\(rows\)}, Non-null: {len\(non_null\)}'\); print\('Most recent non-null:', non_null[-1] if non_null else 'NONE'\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ try { const j=JSON.parse\(d\); const rows=j.table.rows; const nonnull=rows.filter\(r=>r[3]!==null\); console.log\('Total rows:', rows.length, 'Non-null:', nonnull.length\); if\(nonnull.length\) console.log\('Most recent non-null:', nonnull[nonnull.length-1]\); } catch\(e\){ console.log\('Parse error or API error:', d.slice\(0,300\)\); } }\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ try{ const j=JSON.parse\(d\); const rows=j.table.rows; const nonnull=rows.filter\(r=>r[3]!==null&&r[3]>-9\); const avg=nonnull.reduce\(\(a,b\)=>a+b[3],0\)/nonnull.length; console.log\('SST rows:',rows.length,'non-null:',nonnull.length,'avg:',avg.toFixed\(2\)+'°C'\); } catch\(e\){ console.log\('Error:',d.slice\(0,300\)\); } }\)")
